title: Transformation
description: Defines an entity's transformation from the current definition into another

block_assist_chance.title: Block Assist Chance
block_assist_chance.description: Chance that the entity will look for nearby blocks that can speed up the transformation. Value must be between 0.0 and 1.0

block_chance.title: Block Chance
block_chance.description: Chance that, once a block is found, will help speed up the transformation

block_max.title: Block Max
block_max.description: Maximum number of blocks the entity will look for to aid in the transformation. If not defined or set to 0, it will be set to the block radius

block_radius.title: Block Radius
block_radius.description: Distance in Blocks that the entity will search for blocks that can help the transformation

block_types.title: Block Types
block_types.description: List of blocks that can help the transformation of this entity

range_max.title: Range Max
range_max.description: Time in seconds to be added to value to have the maximum random time range value until the entity transforms (if non-zero then the time in seconds before the entity transforms will be random between value+range_min and value+range_max)

range_min.title: Range Min
range_min.description: Time in seconds to be added to value to have the minimum random time range value until the entity transforms (if non-zero then the time in seconds before the entity transforms will be random between value+range_min and value+range_max)

value.title: Value
value.description: Time in seconds before the entity transforms

delay.title: Delay
delay.description:
Defines the properties of the delay for the transformation. Can be a simple number (seconds) or a complex object.

Properties:
• block_assist_chance (float) = 0
• block_chance (float) = 0
• block_max (int) = 0
• block_radius (int) = 0
• block_types (string[])
• range_max (float) = 0
• range_min (float) = 0
• value (float) = 0

Sample values:
• pig: 0.5

add.title: Add
add.description:
List of components to add to the entity after the transformation

Properties:
• component_groups (string[])

component_groups.title: Component Groups
component_groups.description: Names of component groups to add

begin_transform_sound.title: Begin Transform Sound
begin_transform_sound.description: Sound to play when the transformation starts

drop_equipment.title: Drop Equipment
drop_equipment.description: Cause the entity to drop all equipment upon transformation

drop_inventory.title: Drop Inventory
drop_inventory.description:
Cause the entity to drop all items in inventory upon transformation

Sample values:
• skeleton: true

into.title: Into
into.description:
Entity Definition that this entity will transform into

Sample values:
• hoglin: minecraft:zoglin
• pig: minecraft:pig_zombie
• skeleton: minecraft:stray

keep_level.title: Keep Level
keep_level.description:
If this entity has trades and has leveled up, it should maintain that level after transformation.

Sample values:
• hoglin: true

keep_owner.title: Keep Owner
keep_owner.description: If this entity is owned by another entity, it should remain owned after transformation.

preserve_equipment.title: Preserve Equipment
preserve_equipment.description:
Cause the entity to keep equipment after going through transformation

Sample values:
• skeleton: true

transformation_sound.title: Transformation Sound
transformation_sound.description:
Sound to play when the entity is done transforming

Sample values:
• hoglin: mob.hoglin.converted_to_zombified
• pig: mob.pig.death
• skeleton: convert_to_stray
